bullets: Battle Formations lock in leaders, transport cargo an' reserves BEFORE anyone deploys.
Da roll-off dialog: roll, read da result, winner picks who deploys first.
Deploy: pick a unit row, click da board to place, [b]Confirm[/b] locks it. Q/E turns a vehicle.
Formation buttons (Single / Spread / Tight) place a whole squad quick.
You an' da enemy take turns deployin'. Next lesson: Get Movin'.

prompt.kbm: Before deployin', dis panel locks in yer [b]Battle Formations[/b]. First: under [b]LEADER ATTACHMENTS[/b], set da 'Warboss →' dropdown to [b]Boyz[/b] — now he fights wiv his mob.
prompt.pad: Dis panel locks in yer [b]Battle Formations[/b]. Glide {ls} onto da 'Warboss →' dropdown, {a}, an' pick [b]Boyz[/b].

hint.text: Top section of da panel — da dropdown next to 'Warboss →'.

prompt.kbm: Under [b]TRANSPORT EMBARKATION[/b], tick [b]Boyz[/b] — da mob (an' da Boss wiv 'em) starts da battle inside da Battlewagon.
prompt.pad: Glide {ls} onto da [b]Boyz[/b] tickbox under TRANSPORT EMBARKATION an' press {a}.

prompt.kbm: Hit [b]Confirm Formations[/b] — dat sends all yer declarations at once. Da enemy declares deirs after.
Deployment roll-off: click [b]⚄ Roll the dice[/b] in da dialog (roll again on a tie), den [b]Continue[/b] — da winner picks who deploys first.
prompt.pad: Press {a} on da dialog's Roll button. Re-roll ties, den Continue.

hint.text: Da dialog's Roll button works too — same fing.

prompt.kbm: Click [b]Battlewagon[/b] in da list, den click inside yer glowin' deployment zone to place it. {key:rotate_left}/{key:rotate_right} turns it. [b]Confirm[/b] locks it in.
prompt.pad: Pick da [b]Battlewagon[/b] row, glide {ls} into yer zone, {a} to place, den [b]Confirm[/b].

hint.text: Yer zone is da highlighted band at da top of da board. Undo an' Reset Unit are on da unit card.

prompt.kbm: Da enemy deploys between yer units — dat's da alternation. Now: click [b]Gretchin[/b], pick da [b]Tight[/b] formation, click open ground in yer zone to lay da whole squad out, den [b]Confirm[/b].
prompt.pad: Pick da [b]Gretchin[/b] row, glide onto [b]Tight[/b], {a}, place 'em wiv {a}, den [b]Confirm[/b].

hint.text: Formation buttons sit on da unit card — Single / Spread / Tight change how a click lays da mob down. Keep da whole blob inside da glowin' zone.

prompt.kbm: Yer Boyz are already in da wagon, so muster's done. One last roll-off decides who takes da first turn — [b]Roll[/b] in da dialog (again on a tie), den [b]Continue[/b].
prompt.pad: Press {a} on da dialog's Roll button — again on a tie — den Continue.

done.script:
var p = int(GameState.state.meta.get("phase", -1))
return p != 1 and p != 2 and p != 13 and p != 3

hint.text: Keep pressin' on ties — da dice settle eventually.

prompt.text: Army's on da table: wagon loaded, grots spread, Boss ridin' wiv his ladz. Da battle rounds start now — [b]Get Movin'[/b] teaches da movement phase.
